prompt: a text based game related space and survival

appPlan.tagline: Your choices echo through the stars

screens.name: Ship Bridge
screens.description: Main command center showing ship status, crew, and current situation narrative

screens.name: Story Screen
screens.description: Immersive text narrative with choice buttons and atmospheric visuals

screens.name: Ship Systems
screens.description: Manage oxygen, fuel, food, hull integrity, and power levels

screens.name: Crew Roster
screens.description: View crew members, their skills, health, and morale status

screens.name: Star Map
screens.description: Navigate between planets, stations, and points of interest

screens.name: Captain's Log
screens.description: Journal of past decisions, discoveries, and story progress

suggestedFeatures.name: Consequential Choices
suggestedFeatures.description: Every decision ripples forward - save fuel now and starve later, rescue a stranger who might betray you, creating deeply personal story paths with no perfect playthrough

suggestedFeatures.name: Survival Resource Management
suggestedFeatures.description: Constantly balance oxygen, food, fuel, and power - tough choices like venting a compartment to save oxygen or rationing food force impossible decisions that define your story

suggestedFeatures.name: Crew Relationships & Skills
suggestedFeatures.description: Each crew member has personality, skills, and opinions - engineer fixes systems faster, medic keeps crew alive, but conflicts arise and trust must be earned through choices

suggestedFeatures.name: Procedural Space Encounters
suggestedFeatures.description: Distress signals, asteroid fields, alien contacts, and derelict ships appear randomly, ensuring each playthrough feels fresh and unpredictable

suggestedFeatures.name: Iron Captain Mode
suggestedFeatures.description: Optional permadeath where poor choices end your journey permanently - heightens tension and makes every decision genuinely matter

suggestedFeatures.name: Typewriter Text Effect
suggestedFeatures.description: Story text appears letter by letter with ambient ship sounds, creating cinematic tension during critical moments and dangerous encounters

suggestedFeatures.name: Divergent Endings
suggestedFeatures.description: Reach Earth, colonize a new world, become space pirates, or drift forever - dramatically different conclusions based on accumulated choices and relationships

suggestedFeatures.name: Shareable Story Export
suggestedFeatures.description: Export your unique journey as a readable story to share with friends, showing your path through the void and the choices that defined it

techStack: SwiftData for game state and save system
Ink narrative scripting engine or custom parser
AVFoundation for ambient audio and sound effects
CloudKit for save sync across devices

activity.message: 🚀 Analyzing: "a text based game related space and survival"

config.appDescription: A simple todo app with task lists

screens.name: Home
screens.description: Main screen with task list

screens.name: Task Lists
screens.description: Dark theme home screen (#0D0D0F background). Top section: large bold 'My Lists' title in white, '+' button on right to add new list. Below: vertical list of task list cards with dark gray (#1C1C1E) backgrounds, 12px border radius. Each card shows colored circle icon on left, list name in white, task count badge in gray (e.g., '5 tasks'). Swipe left reveals red delete button. Bottom: tab bar with Lists (active, accent color) and Settings icons on dark background.

screens.name: Task List Detail
screens.description: Dark theme task view (#0D0D0F background). Top navigation: back arrow, list name centered in white, overflow menu (three dots). Progress bar below showing completion percentage with accent color fill. Main content: scrollable task list with dark gray (#1C1C1E) cards. Each task has circular checkbox on left (empty or filled with checkmark), task title in white (strikethrough when complete), optional due date in small gray text. Completed tasks have reduced opacity. Floating action button bottom right: accent color circle with '+' icon to add task. Empty state: illustration with 'No tasks yet' text.

screens.name: Add Task
screens.description: Dark theme modal sheet (#1C1C1E background). Top: drag indicator, 'New Task' title centered, 'Done' button in accent color. Form fields with darker gray (#2C2C2E) input backgrounds: task title text field with placeholder 'What needs to be done?', optional notes multiline field. Date picker row: calendar icon, 'Due Date' label, chevron to expand inline date picker. Priority selector: three pill buttons (Low, Medium, High) with Medium default selected in accent. Bottom: large 'Add Task' button full width in accent color with white text, 48px height, rounded corners.

screens.name: Add List
screens.description: Dark theme modal (#1C1C1E background). Drag indicator at top. 'New List' title with 'Save' button in accent. List name text field with dark input background. Icon/color picker section: 6x2 grid of colored circles (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, pink, gray) - tap to select, selected shows checkmark. Below: grid of list icons (home, work, shopping, fitness, personal, star). Preview card at bottom showing how the list will appear with selected color and icon.

screens.name: Settings
screens.description: Dark theme settings screen (#0D0D0F background). 'Settings' title large at top. Grouped sections with dark gray (#1C1C1E) backgrounds and 12px radius. Section 'Appearance': Dark Mode toggle (always on/locked indicator). Section 'Tasks': 'Show Completed' toggle, 'Default Priority' picker row. Section 'Data': 'Export Tasks' row with chevron, 'Delete All Completed' in red text. Section 'About': app version, rate app link, privacy policy link. All rows have labels in white, secondary text in gray (#8E8E93), toggles use accent color when on.

screens.name: Home
screens.description: Task list screen

screens.name: Home
screens.description: Dark theme main screen (#0A0A0B background). Top: large bold 'Tasks' title in white left-aligned, circular profile/settings icon on right. Below title: horizontal filter chips - 'All', 'Today', 'Completed' in pill shapes, selected chip has accent blue (#007AFF) background with white text, unselected are dark gray (#1C1C1E) with gray text. Main content: scrollable task list. Each task row has dark card (#1C1C1E) with 12px radius, 16px padding. Left side: circular checkbox (empty circle outline, accent fill with checkmark when done). Center: task text in white, completed tasks show strikethrough with 50% opacity. Right: subtle chevron. Empty state: minimal illustration, 'No tasks yet' in gray, 'Add your first task' subtext. Floating action button: bottom right, 56px accent blue circle with white '+' icon, subtle shadow.

screens.name: Add Task
screens.description: Dark theme bottom sheet sliding up (#1C1C1E background, top rounded corners 20px). Drag handle: small gray pill centered at top. Input area: large text field with no visible border, white placeholder 'What do you need to do?', 18px font. Below input: horizontal row of quick-action icon buttons - calendar (set date), flag (priority), tag icon - all in gray (#8E8E93), 44px tap targets. Keyboard appears with dark theme. Above keyboard on right: circular send button in accent blue with white arrow/checkmark icon. When date selected, small pill badge appears showing 'Today' or date below input.

screens.name: Task Detail
screens.description: Dark theme full screen (#0A0A0B background). Top navigation: back arrow on left, overflow menu (three dots) on right for edit/delete. Main content: task title in large white bold text at top. Status section: rounded rectangle (#1C1C1E) with checkbox and 'Mark Complete' label. Details card below (#1C1C1E, 12px radius): rows for 'Due Date' with calendar icon and date value, 'Priority' with flag icon and colored badge (red/orange/gray), 'Notes' section with multiline gray text if present. Each row separated by subtle 1px divider (#2C2C2E). Bottom action: 'Delete Task' text button in red (#FF3B30) centered.

screens.name: Settings
screens.description: Dark theme settings screen (#0A0A0B background). Top: 'Settings' title large bold white. Grouped list sections with dark gray (#1C1C1E) rounded cards. Section 'Appearance': 'Dark Mode' row with toggle switch locked in on position, accent blue color. Section 'Tasks': 'Show Completed Tasks' toggle (default on), 'Clear Completed' row with red text and trash icon. Section 'About': 'Version' row showing '1.0.0' in gray right-aligned, 'Rate App' with star icon, 'Send Feedback' with envelope icon. All section headers in small uppercase gray text (#6C6C70) above each card. Row icons in accent blue, labels in white, secondary values in gray.

App: TodoAppV2
Screens: Home, Add Task, Task Detail, Settings

Description: A simple todo app

Requirements:
1. Create proper Xcode project with .xcodeproj
2. Placeholder SwiftUI views for each screen (with TODO: implement UI comments)
3. Set up TabView or NavigationStack navigation
4. Create data models and service stubs
5. Must compile and run on iOS 17+ simulator
6. Use Swift 5.9+ modern patterns

Create all files now. UI will be implemented from designs later." --json --timeout 180

config.appDescription: An alarm app when user did not wake up have to pay a price

screens.name: Home
screens.description: Main landing screen with key features

screens.name: Settings
screens.description: App settings and preferences

screens.name: Home
screens.description: Dark theme main screen (#09090B background). Top: 'Alarmie' logo text in white with small flame icon, wallet balance pill on right showing '$12.50' in green. Center focus: large circular ring showing next alarm time '06:30' in bold white 48px font, 'Tomorrow' label below in gray. Stake amount displayed beneath: '$1.00 at risk' in orange (#F97316). Below circle: horizontal scroll of upcoming alarm cards with dark gray (#18181B) backgrounds showing time, days active, and stake amount. Bottom floating button: large rounded rectangle 'Set New Alarm' in accent orange with white text. Tab bar: Home (active), History, Settings icons.

screens.name: Set Alarm
screens.description: Dark theme full screen (#09090B). Top navigation: 'Cancel' text left, 'New Alarm' title center, 'Save' in orange right. Large time picker: spinning drum style with hours and minutes in white, AM/PM selector, dark selection highlight bar. Below picker in card sections (#18181B, 12px radius): 'Repeat' row with weekday letter circles (M T W T F S S) - tap to toggle, selected in orange fill. 'Stake Amount' section: horizontal slider from $0.50 to $5.00 with orange track, current value '$1.00' displayed large. 'Wake Challenge' row with chevron showing selected challenge type. 'Sound' row with alarm tone name. 'Label' text field for alarm name. Live Activity preview card at bottom showing how notification will appear.

screens.name: Wake Challenge
screens.description: Full screen dark overlay when alarm fires. Bright orange pulsing border indicates urgency. Top: current time large '06:30' with 'WAKE UP!' flashing text. Stake warning: '$1.00 will be charged in 2:45' with countdown timer in red. Challenge area center: math problem displayed '24 × 7 = ?' with number pad below for input, or shake progress bar showing '0/50 shakes', or QR scan viewfinder. Wrong answer feedback: screen flashes red briefly, haptic buzz. Progress indicator shows challenge completion percentage. Emergency snooze button at bottom: 'Snooze (+$0.50)' indicating additional stake for snooze. Screen brightness forced to maximum.

screens.name: Wallet
screens.description: Dark theme screen (#09090B). Top: 'Wallet' title large white, info icon. Balance card: large gradient card (dark gray to slightly lighter) showing 'Available Balance' label, '$12.50' in large green text, 'Add Funds' button in outline style. Stats section below: 'This Month' header, three metric cards in row - 'Saved' in green showing money kept, 'Lost' in red showing penalties paid, 'Wake Rate' showing percentage with circular progress. Transaction history list: dark cards showing date, alarm time, and outcome ('+$1.00 Saved' in green or '-$1.00 Penalty' in red). Filter chips: 'All', 'Saved', 'Penalties'. Empty state for new users with illustration.

screens.name: History
screens.description: Dark theme screen (#09090B). Top: 'History' title, calendar icon button to jump to date. Monthly calendar view: compact calendar grid with dots indicating alarm days - green dots for successful wakes, red for penalties, gray for upcoming. Below calendar: 'March 2026' section header with stats summary (15 wakes, 2 misses, $13.00 saved). Daily entries list: cards showing date, alarm time, wake time, time difference ('+3 min'), challenge completed, and money saved/lost. Tap card to expand showing detailed metrics: time to dismiss, snoozes used, challenge attempts. Streak indicator: flame icon with '12 day streak' badge.

screens.name: Settings
screens.description: Dark theme settings (#09090B). Grouped sections with dark cards (#18181B). Section 'Alarm Defaults': default stake amount stepper, default challenge type picker, sound selection row. Section 'Stakes': 'Payment Method' row showing card ending in 4242, 'Auto-reload' toggle with threshold amount, 'Withdrawal' row to cash out balance. Section 'Challenges': toggle rows for each challenge type (Math, Shake, QR Scan, Photo) to enable/disable, difficulty selector (Easy/Medium/Hard). Section 'Notifications': Live Activity toggle, critical alerts toggle, haptic intensity slider. Section 'Widgets': preview of available widget sizes with 'Add Widget' instruction text. iCloud sync status indicator at bottom.

screens.name: Widget Preview
screens.description: Dark widget designs for home screen. Small widget (square): next alarm time '06:30' large, stake amount '$1.00' in orange below, app icon corner. Medium widget (rectangular): shows next 2 alarms with times and days, total daily stake, current streak flame badge. Large widget: weekly view showing all set alarms as timeline, daily success indicators (checkmarks/X), week's savings total in green. Lock screen widget: minimal showing just next alarm time and stake. Live Activity (Dynamic Island): expanded shows alarm time, countdown, stake amount; compact shows clock icon and time; minimal shows just alarm indicator.
